37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer.
37.extractionRationale: The page mentions a 'Spare parts' section but the actual SKU details and count are not provided in the available excerpt. The content cuts off before listing specific replacement/spare part SKUs.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims. All DT Swiss wheelsets are tubeless compatible and the ASM versions come tubeless ready, equipped with tubeless tape and valves.
45.extractionRationale: Evidence shows DT Swiss manufactures and uses their own proprietary "DT Swiss tubeless valve" rather than Clik valve. No sources mention Clik valve adoption by DT Swiss or any other major brand (Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) in 2026/2027 product lines. Therefore, 0% of major brands have converted to Clik valve as standard.

57.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern - rot | 2 Stück | BIKE24
57.evidenceText: Product listing pages show CoreCap products available on BIKE24.de and BIKE24.com, but no stock status, availability dates, or "back in stock" information is present in the provided content.
57.extractionRationale: The provided evidence contains only product names, features, and related product images from BIKE24 product pages. No stock availability status, dates, or restock turnaround information is present in any of the three sources. Therefore, cannot determine B2B restock turnaround time and returning null.
